summary: Locale fix is correct and well-tested. One unaddressed concern from geositta: closingFeeRate ?? 0 shows fee-free (inflated) estimated PnL while usePerpsOrderFees is loading — should guard with closingFeeRate === undefined.

comments.body: Same `closingFeeRate ?? 0` concern as in AutoCloseSection — PnL row visible with zero fees while the hook loads. Add `closingFeeRate === undefined` to the guard here and at line 230 (SL memo).
